params.text: Safety event identified during this episode and escalated through institutional reporting. Care team notified for prompt review and transparent patient/family communication. Care plan updated to include close symptom monitoring, reassessment for any unresolved concerns, and safety follow-up.

params.plan_text: Discharge planning updated: review current symptoms before discharge, promptly report any new or unresolved symptoms, follow up with the care team as arranged, and ensure patient/family receive clear communication regarding the safety event and next steps.
